expected# If any of the checks fail, the script will exit with a non-zero status# This will indicate that there is an issue that needs to be addressed# The script will also output the results of each check to the console# This will make it easier to debug any issues that arise# The script is intended to be run as a cron job, so it should be as silent as possible# It will only output to the console if there is an error# Otherwise, it will run in the background and not interfere with normal operation# The script will exit with a status of 0 if all checks pass# If any checks fail, it will exit with a non-zero status# This will make it easy to monitor the system and ensure that everything is working as expected# The script is designed to be run on a regular basis# This will help to catch any issues before they become major problems# The script is also designed to be run on multiple systems# This will help to ensure that the system is working as expected across the board# The script is designed to be as efficient as possible# It will not use any unnecessary resources# It will also be as concise as possible# This will make it easier to read and understand# The script is designed to
